summary: Iteration 3 testing complete - All new features working correctly: All categories visible (59 categories, not sliced to 15), 50 products per category, Customer mode (?tienda) with green theme and correct labels
critical_code_review_comments: Cart.js has unused import 'Search' from lucide-react (line 2) - minor cleanup needed
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests used existing WooCommerce products
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features tested and working. Customer mode (?tienda) shows green theme, 'Tu Pedido/Tu Teléfono/Tus Datos' labels, no operator field. POS mode shows red theme, 'Pedido por Teléfono/Teléfono del Cliente/Datos del Cliente' labels, operator field visible.

backend./api/categories: PASS - Returns 58 categories (all categories, not sliced to 15)
backend./api/products/top-sellers?limit=50&categ: PASS - Returns products filtered by category

frontend.POS Mode Header: PASS - Red header with 'MERCALO POS', Pedidos button, Sincronizar button visible
frontend.Customer Mode Header: PASS - Green header with 'MERCALO', Compartir button visible, NO Pedidos/Sincronizar buttons
frontend.All Categories Visible: PASS - 59 category buttons in filter bar (not sliced to 15)
frontend.Desktop Layout: PASS - 8-column grid (xl:grid-cols-8), cart panel on right side
frontend.Customer Mode Mobile FAB: PASS - Green FAB with cart icon
frontend.Customer Mode Checkout Form: PASS - Shows 'TU PEDIDO' banner, 'TU TELÉFONO' label, 'TUS DATOS' label, NO operator field
frontend.POS Mode Checkout Form: PASS - Shows 'PEDIDO POR TELÉFONO' banner, operator field, 'TELÉFONO DEL CLIENTE', 'DATOS DEL CLIENTE' labels

customer_mode_detection.actual: Customer mode correctly detected via URL param

customer_mode_theme.actual: bg-green-600 applied to header, FAB, and checkout button
